---
title: "Temperature Sensor Analysis Guide"
author: "Marc Los Huertos"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Set-Up Directories

```
project/
|-- data_raw/          # raw sensor CSVs (many files)
|   |-- 260191640D.csv
|   |-- 260191640E.csv
|   `-- ...
|-- data_clean/
|   |-- 260191640D.csv
|   |-- 260191640E.csv
|   `-- ...
|-- data_meta/
|   `-- locations_treatments.csv
|-- data_processed/
`-- scripts/
    `-- read_and_merge.R
```

## Set-Up Sensor Metadata

```{r paths}
# --------------------------------------------------
# Paths -- change with your setup!
# --------------------------------------------------
raw_data_dir  <- "/home/mwl04747/RTricks/A14_Public_Space_Temperature/data_clean"
meta_file     <- "/home/mwl04747/RTricks/A14_Public_Space_Temperature/data_meta/locations_treatments.csv"
```

## Merge Data

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
# --------------------------------------------------
# Libraries
# --------------------------------------------------
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)

# --------------------------------------------------
# Function: read ONE sensor file
# --------------------------------------------------
read_sensor_file <- function(tmp) {

  Sensor_id <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(tmp))

  df <- read.csv(tmp, header = FALSE)

  names(df) <- c("Date", "Time", "Fahrenheit", "Centigrade")

  df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Sensor_id = Sensor_id,
      Datetime = as.POSIXct(
        paste(Date, Time),
        format = "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S",
        tz = "Etc/GMT+6"   # matches UTC-06:00 stated in file
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      Sensor_id,
      Datetime,
      Fahrenheit,
      Centigrade
    )
}
# --------------------------------------------------
# Read ALL sensor files
# --------------------------------------------------
sensor_files <- list.files(
  raw_data_dir,
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

sensor_data <- sensor_files |>
  map_dfr(read_sensor_file)

# --------------------------------------------------
# Read location / treatment metadata
# (will fail loudly if missing — intentional)
# --------------------------------------------------
locations <- read.csv(meta_file)

# Expected columns:
# location_id | site | treatment (shade / sun)

# --------------------------------------------------
# Merge sensor data with metadata
# --------------------------------------------------
sensor_merged <- sensor_data |>
  left_join(locations, by = "Sensor_id")

# --------------------------------------------------
# Basic integrity checks
# --------------------------------------------------
# 1. Any locations missing treatment?
missing_treatment <- sensor_merged |>
  filter(is.na(Treatment)) |>
  distinct(Sensor_id)

if (nrow(missing_treatment) > 0) {
  warning(
    "The following location_ids are missing treatment assignments:\n",
    paste(missing_treatment$Sensor_id, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# Save processed data
# --------------------------------------------------
write_csv(
  sensor_merged,
  "data_processed/sensor_data_with_treatments.csv"
)

```

## Group Data

```{r}
sensor_merged |>
  group_by(Treatment) |>
  summarise(mean_temp = mean(Centigrade, na.rm = TRUE))
```

## Analyze Data

```{r}
lme4::lmer(Centigrade ~ Treatment + (1 | Sensor_id), data = sensor_merged)
```
